en.title: Best Tower Fans 2026
en.description: I ranked the tower fans worth buying for summer 2026, from Dreo's value-packed Pilot Max to Dyson's bladeless purifier and Shark's customizable TurboBlade.

zh-tw.title: 2026 最佳直立式塔扇排行榜
zh-tw.description: 我把 2026 夏天值得買的塔扇排出順序，從性價比之王 Dreo Pilot Max、Dyson 無葉清淨機到 Shark 全角度 TurboBlade 都有。

en.description: A 42-inch bladeless tower with a brushless DC motor that drops to 25dB, 12 speeds, 4 modes, 120-degree oscillation, and full app plus Alexa and Google voice control for 36W.

zh-tw.description: 42 吋無葉塔扇，無刷 DC 馬達最低 25 分貝，12 段風速、4 種模式、120 度擺頭，App 加 Alexa、Google 語音全到位，耗電只有 36 瓦。

en.description: Dyson's bladeless tower pairs a sealed HEPA H13 filter with Air Multiplier projection, so it cools and purifies the whole room from one quiet, design-led machine.

zh-tw.description: Dyson 無葉塔扇把密封 HEPA H13 濾網和 Air Multiplier 氣流投射結合，一台機器又吹涼又清淨整個房間，外型也最有設計感。

en.description: A bladeless tower that pivots from vertical to horizontal, twists its vents, oscillates 180 degrees, and pushes air up to 80 feet with 10 speeds and 10 noise levels.

zh-tw.description: 無葉塔扇可以從直立翻成橫向、出風口還能扭轉方向，180 度擺頭、最遠送風 80 英尺，10 段風速搭 10 段噪音調整，玩法最多。

en.description: A 42-inch DC tower that runs at 28dB on sleep, packs 12 speeds and 4 modes, and adds VeSync app plus voice control at a price well under the smart flagships.

zh-tw.description: 42 吋 DC 塔扇，睡眠模式 28 分貝，12 段風速加 4 種模式，還給你 VeSync App 和語音控制，價格卻壓在智慧旗艦之下。

en.description: A 37-inch oscillating tower built on Vornado's Vortex air circulation, so it moves and mixes the whole room's air instead of pointing a narrow stream at you.

zh-tw.description: 37 吋擺頭塔扇，用 Vornado 招牌渦流空氣循環，把整個房間的空氣攪動對流，靠的是循環整室而不是對著你直吹一條風。

en.description: A 40-inch tower with an energy-saving DC motor, multiple speeds, oscillation, timer, and remote, giving you the quiet DC upgrade at a hard-to-beat price.

zh-tw.description: 40 吋塔扇配省電 DC 馬達，多段風速、擺頭、定時加遙控全包，用很難被打敗的價格就拿到安靜的 DC 馬達升級。

en.description: A 40-inch whole-room tower with 8 QuietSet speeds from sleep to power cool, oscillation, an auto-dimming panel, timer, and remote for well under a hundred dollars.

zh-tw.description: 40 吋全室塔扇，8 段 QuietSet 風速從睡眠一路到強力涼風，擺頭、面板自動變暗、定時加遙控，價格相當親民。

en.description: A smart tower with a 26-foot air range, 75-degree oscillation, and a Nature mode that varies the rhythm to feel like a real breeze, all controllable by app and voice.

zh-tw.description: 智慧塔扇，送風達 26 英尺、75 度擺頭，還有 Nature 模式會變化節奏模擬自然微風，App 和語音都能控制，是智慧塔扇的入門好選擇。

references.title: Dreo vs. Dyson in 2026: The Specs That Make This $129 Fan a Legit Rival
The Best Tower Fan | Lab Tested & Ranked
Dyson Purifier Cool Gen1 TP10 Purifying Fan review

en.commentary: I put the Dreo Pilot Max S at number one because it delivers the quiet bladeless experience most people actually want at a price that undercuts the prestige names by hundreds of dollars. Its brushless DC motor bottoms out at 25dB, which is genuinely quieter than a whisper across a bedroom, and the 12 speeds give you the granularity to dial in exactly the airflow you want before sleep. App, Alexa, and Google control all work without a paywall. Dyson's TP10 stays my pick when air quality matters, because the sealed HEPA H13 filter and Air Multiplier projection do something no plain fan can, and the build quality is in its own league. I rank Shark's TurboBlade third for sheer versatility, since pivoting it horizontal to push air 80 feet down a hallway is a trick the others cannot match. Levoit's Classic 42 is the smart fan to buy when budget is tight, and Vornado earns its spot for moving whole-room air through vortex circulation rather than a narrow beam. For a hot Taiwan summer, the honest answer is that a $130 Dreo or Levoit cools a bedroom just as well as a fan costing three times more.

highlights.title: The Dreo Pilot Max S is the tower fan to buy in 2026
highlights.body: It hits 25dB on its quiet DC motor, offers 12 speeds for precise control, and bundles app plus Alexa and Google voice at around a third of Dyson's price. For the overwhelming majority of buyers who want a quiet, capable bedroom fan, paying more buys diminishing returns.

highlights.title: Dyson's TP10 is worth it only when you need purification
highlights.body: The sealed HEPA H13 filter captures allergens and fine particles while it cools, which is a real advantage during pollen season or in a dusty room. If you just want airflow, the gap between it and a $130 smart tower does not justify the premium.

highlights.title: Shark's TurboBlade owns the versatility crown
highlights.body: It pivots from vertical to horizontal, twists its vents in two directions, and reaches up to 80 feet. That makes it the one fan here that can cool a person on a sofa and circulate air down a long open-plan space, which fixed-direction towers cannot.

highlights.title: Budget buyers should look at Lasko and Honeywell
highlights.body: The Lasko Summit Pinnacle brings a quiet DC motor for the price of a basic AC fan, and the Honeywell QuietSet HYF290 gives whole-room cooling with 8 speeds for well under a hundred dollars. Both cool a Taiwan bedroom through the night without the smart-fan markup.

zh-tw.commentary: 我把 Dreo Pilot Max S 放第一，因為它用低於名牌好幾千塊的價格，給了大多數人真正想要的安靜無葉體驗。無刷 DC 馬達最低壓到 25 分貝，在臥室裡比講悄悄話還安靜，12 段風速讓你睡前能精準調到剛好的風量。App、Alexa、Google 語音全部免費內建，不用再加錢解鎖。Dyson TP10 在你在意空氣品質時還是我的首選，密封 HEPA H13 濾網加 Air Multiplier 氣流投射是純風扇做不到的事,做工更是自成一級。Shark TurboBlade 排第三靠的是玩法，把它翻成橫向、沿著走廊送風 80 英尺,這招其他塔扇辦不到。Levoit Classic 42 是預算吃緊時該買的智慧扇,Vornado 則靠渦流循環攪動整室空氣站穩一席。講白了,面對台灣這種濕熱夏天,一台三千多的 Dreo 或 Levoit,吹涼一間臥室的效果跟貴三倍的扇子沒兩樣。

highlights.title: 2026 要買塔扇,Dreo Pilot Max S 就是答案
highlights.body: DC 安靜馬達最低 25 分貝,12 段風速精準可調,還把 App 加 Alexa、Google 語音整包送你,價格大約只有 Dyson 的三分之一。對絕大多數只想要一台安靜好用臥室扇的人來說,再往上加錢買到的進步很有限。

highlights.title: Dyson TP10 只在你需要清淨時才值得
highlights.body: 密封 HEPA H13 濾網一邊吹涼一邊濾掉過敏原和細懸浮微粒,在花粉季或灰塵多的房間是真本事。但如果你只想要風,它跟一台三千多智慧塔扇之間的差距,撐不起那個價差。

highlights.title: Shark TurboBlade 拿下玩法王座
highlights.body: 它能從直立翻成橫向、出風口往兩個方向扭轉,送風最遠 80 英尺。這讓它成為這份榜單裡唯一一台,既能對著沙發上的人吹涼,又能沿著開放空間把空氣循環推到底的扇子,固定方向的塔扇做不到。

highlights.title: 預算族看 Lasko 跟 Honeywell 就好
highlights.body: Lasko Summit Pinnacle 用一台普通 AC 扇的價格給你安靜 DC 馬達,Honeywell QuietSet HYF290 則用相當親民的價格提供 8 段全室涼風。兩台都能讓台灣的臥室整晚保持涼爽,還不用付智慧扇的溢價。

references.title: Dreo vs. Dyson in 2026: The Specs That Make This $129 Fan a Legit Rival
The best tower fans of 2026, tested and reviewed
10 Best Amazon Prime Day Tower Fan Deals (June 2026)

en.commentary: Summer heat plus Prime Day from June 23 to 26 makes this the right week to buy a tower fan, and it reinforces the verdict at the top of my list. The Dreo Pilot Max S stays first and I am more confident than ever. Fresh testing this month put Dreo fans quieter than Dyson even at max speed, and the Dreo lineup is landing on Prime Day around the $70 mark while Dyson sits north of $400 for comparable airflow. That gap is the whole story. I bumped the Pilot Max S value score because a flagship tier fan under $70 during the sale is exceptional. The Dyson Purifier Cool TP10 holds second purely on materials, fit, and finish. It is the most beautifully built fan here and the only one with real air purification, so if you want a quiet appliance that doubles as decor and a filter, it earns the premium. But on pure cooling per dollar it loses to the Dreo and that is fine. The Shark TurboBlade keeps third on the strongest raw airflow in the group, ideal for big rooms. Levoit remains my value sleeper at fourth, often on sale near $50 with reach almost matching the Dreo. For most homes I would buy the Dreo on Prime Day and stop thinking about it. Spend the Dyson money only if purification and looks matter as much as the breeze.

highlights.title: The Dreo Pilot Max S is the buy of the season
highlights.body: New testing this month confirmed Dreo runs quieter than Dyson even wide open, and Prime Day pricing near $70 against Dyson's $400 plus makes the value gap impossible to ignore. A flagship tier fan at that price during the sale is why I pushed its value score higher.

highlights.title: Dyson earns second on craftsmanship, not cooling
highlights.body: The TP10 is the best built fan here and the only one that genuinely purifies the air. If you want an appliance that looks like decor and filters your room, the premium is justified. On cooling per dollar alone it cannot catch the Dreo, and that is the honest trade.

highlights.title: Shark TurboBlade is the big room cannon
highlights.body: It holds third because nothing else in this group moves air with the same force. For large open spaces where reach matters more than smart features, this is the one that actually fills the room.

highlights.title: Buy during Prime Day or pay more in July
highlights.body: Tower fan demand peaks with the heat, and the deepest discounts of the summer are live right now. Grabbing the Dreo or the Levoit this week beats paying full price when stock tightens later in the season.

zh-tw.commentary: 夏天熱起來加上 6 月 23 到 26 號的 Prime Day，這週就是入手循環扇的最佳時機，也讓我榜首的判斷更站得住腳。Dreo Pilot Max S 穩坐第一，而且我比以前更有把握。這個月新的實測顯示 Dreo 連開到最大風速都比 Dyson 安靜，而 Dreo 整個系列 Prime Day 殺到 70 美元上下，Dyson 同等風量卻要四百多美元。這個價差就是全部的重點。我把 Pilot Max S 的 value 分數往上調，畢竟特價期間旗艦級風扇不到 70 美元真的太誇張。Dyson Purifier Cool TP10 排第二純粹靠材質跟做工。它是這裡做工最漂亮的一台，也是唯一有真正空氣清淨功能的，所以你要的是一台安靜又能當擺設兼濾網的家電，這個溢價它撐得起來。可是論每塊錢的涼感它輸 Dreo，這沒什麼好爭的。Shark TurboBlade 靠全組最強的純風量守住第三，大坪數空間很合用。Levoit 還是我心中第四的 CP 值黑馬，常常特價殺到 50 美元上下，風量逼近 Dreo。一般家庭我會直接趁 Prime Day 收 Dreo，然後別再想了。除非清淨跟外型對你跟涼風一樣重要，才去花 Dyson 那筆錢。

highlights.title: Dreo Pilot Max S 是這季最該入手的
highlights.body: 這個月的新實測證實 Dreo 連全開都比 Dyson 安靜，Prime Day 殺到 70 美元上下對上 Dyson 四百多美元，這個價差讓人無法視而不見。特價期間旗艦級風扇賣這個價，就是我把 value 分數調高的原因。

highlights.title: Dyson 第二名靠的是做工跟質感
highlights.body: TP10 是這裡做工最好的風扇，也是唯一真正能清淨空氣的。你要的是一台像擺設又能濾房間的家電，這個溢價就合理。但單論每塊錢的涼感它追不上 Dreo，這是老實的取捨。

highlights.title: Shark TurboBlade 是大坪數的火砲
highlights.body: 它守住第三是因為這組裡沒別台能用同樣力道送風。大型開放空間裡，吹得遠比智慧功能更重要的時候，這台才真的能灌滿整個房間。

highlights.title: 趁 Prime Day 收，不然七月多花錢
highlights.body: 天氣一熱循環扇需求就衝高，整個夏天最深的折扣現在正在跑。這週把 Dreo 或 Levoit 收進來，比之後旺季缺貨用原價買划算。

references.title: The best tower fans of 2026, tested and reviewed
Dreo vs. Dyson in 2026: The Specs That Make This $129 Fan a Legit Rival

en.commentary: With the heat wave on, tower fans are flying off shelves and the Dreo Pilot Max S stays my rank 1, full stop. It pairs a brushless DC motor pushing air up to 28 feet per second with a noise floor around 20 decibels, which is among the quietest in its class, and it does this at roughly 129 dollars against the 400-plus you pay for a comparable Dyson. Reviewers keep finding it quieter than Dyson even at max speed, and the value math there is simply hard to argue with. The Dyson Purifier Cool TP10 holds rank 2 on build quality and the bonus of HEPA purification, it is the premium pick if air filtering matters as much as airflow to you. The Shark TurboBlade keeps rank 3 as the airflow king, its 9.6 airflow score is the highest here and it reaches the farthest, making it my pick for large open rooms. The Levoit Classic 42 Smart holds rank 4 as the quiet value choice, and the Vornado OSCR37 stays at rank 5 on its signature whole-room circulation. During a heat wave I would prioritize a strong DC-motor fan you can run all night, the quiet operation matters as much as the airflow when you are trying to sleep through it.

highlights.title: Dreo Pilot Max S wins on value
highlights.body: 28 ft/s airflow and a roughly 20 dB noise floor at about 129 dollars versus 400-plus for Dyson keep it at rank 1.

highlights.title: Dyson TP10 is the premium pick
highlights.body: Top build quality plus HEPA purification hold it at rank 2 for buyers who want filtering with their airflow.

highlights.title: Shark TurboBlade reaches farthest
highlights.body: A class-best 9.6 airflow score and the longest reach make it the rank 3 choice for large open rooms.

highlights.title: Levoit covers quiet value
highlights.body: The Classic 42 Smart pairs a 9.3 noise score with a friendly price, holding rank 4.

highlights.title: Prioritize a quiet DC motor
highlights.body: For sleeping through a heat wave, run-all-night quiet operation matters as much as raw airflow.

zh-tw.commentary: 熱浪一來，大廈扇開始熱賣，Dreo Pilot Max S 還是我的第一，沒有懸念。它用無刷直流馬達把風送到每秒 28 英尺，噪音底卻只有 20 分貝上下，屬於同級最安靜的一群，而這一切大約 129 鎂就買得到，同級 Dyson 要 400 多鎂。評測一直發現它連開到最大都比 Dyson 安靜，這個 CP 值真的很難反駁。Dyson Purifier Cool TP10 守第二，靠做工跟附帶 HEPA 淨化加分，如果你在意空氣過濾不輸送風，這台就是 premium 之選。Shark TurboBlade 守第三，是送風王，9.6 的風量分數這裡最高，吹得也最遠，大型開放空間我就推這台。Levoit Classic 42 Smart 守第四，是安靜的平價選擇，Vornado OSCR37 靠它招牌的全室循環守第五。熱浪期間我會優先選一台能整晚開的強力直流馬達扇，想睡得著的話，安靜跟風量一樣重要。

highlights.title: Dreo Pilot Max S 價值取勝
highlights.body: 每秒 28 英尺風量配約 20 分貝噪音，約 129 鎂打 Dyson 的 400 多鎂，穩坐第一。

highlights.title: Dyson TP10 是 premium 之選
highlights.body: 頂級做工加 HEPA 淨化，給想要過濾又要送風的人，守第二。

highlights.title: Shark TurboBlade 吹最遠
highlights.body: 9.6 風量分數同級最高，覆蓋最遠，大型開放空間首選，排第三。

highlights.title: Levoit 顧好安靜平價
highlights.body: Classic 42 Smart 把 9.3 噪音分數配親民價，守第四。

highlights.title: 優先選安靜直流馬達
highlights.body: 熱浪想睡得著，整晚開的安靜運轉跟純風量一樣重要。
